title: cola moussavoui
intro: Cola moussavoui, also known as the 'African cola', is a species of plant native to Central and West Africa. It is a member of the Sterculiaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cola moussavoui include the treatment of fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, Cola moussavoui can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
